executives.name: Ian Purdy
executives.background: Mr Purdy is a highly-respected executive with over 30 years’ experience within Australian and international resources companies. He has gained significant experience in the uranium industry through his roles as CFO of Paladin Energy and as a non-executive director of several uranium companies. He has also held senior executive roles with Quadrant Energy, Brookfield Asset Management, Wesfarmers, North Ltd and Mobil Oil Corporation.

executives.name: Anna Sudlow
executives.background: Ms Sudlow is a corporate finance professional with over 25 years’ experience across the energy and resources sectors. She has held senior finance roles with Woodside Energy and several ASX-listed mining companies. She is a Fellow of CPA Australia and a Graduate of the Australian Institute of Company Directors.

executives.name: Jon Price
executives.background: Mr Price is a mining engineer with over 30 years’ experience in the resources sector. He has held senior management and operational roles with several ASX-listed companies, including Phoenix Gold and Horizon Minerals. He has extensive experience in project development and operations management.

executives.name: Jeremy Ryan
executives.background: Mr Ryan is a legal professional with over 20 years’ experience in corporate and commercial law. He has held senior legal and company secretarial roles with several ASX-listed companies in the resources sector. He is a member of the Law Society of Western Australia.

board_of_directors.name: Cliff Lawrenson
board_of_directors.background: Mr Lawrenson has over 30 years’ experience in the resources and energy sectors. He has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Atlas Iron, Ferrum Crescent and GR Engineering Services. He is currently the Non-Executive Chairman of several other ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Main
board_of_directors.background: Mr Main has over 30 years’ experience in the financial markets and resources sectors. He has held senior roles with several investment banks and has extensive experience in corporate finance and capital markets. He is currently a Non-Executive Director of several other ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Watson
board_of_directors.background: Mr Watson is a chemical engineer with over 40 years’ experience in the resources and engineering sectors. He has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Sedgman and GR Engineering Services. He has extensive experience in project development and operations.

board_of_directors.name: Melissa Holzberger
board_of_directors.background: Ms Holzberger is a commercial lawyer with over 20 years’ experience in the resources and energy sectors. She has held senior legal and board positions with several ASX-listed companies and government organisations. She has extensive experience in corporate governance and risk management.

board_of_directors.name: Lesley Adams
board_of_directors.background: Ms Adams has over 30 years’ experience in the resources and energy sectors. She has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Woodside Energy and several mining companies. She has extensive experience in human resources and corporate affairs.

sources.source_description: Paladin Energy Ltd Board of Directors Website
